items.name_en: 🔥 New Version Geometric Bag Small Nappa Suede Featherlight Puzzle Handbag, Original Imported Nappa Calfskin 💥 Outlined by unique geometric lines, the rectangular shape. Soft and lightweight Nappa leather gives the handbag a casual and lazy style. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand *Removable adjustable shoulder strap, featuring a rotating buckle *Zipper closure, articulated zipper puller *One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket *Removable, featuring a hidden pocket and balloon dice *Rectangular metal studs 💡 This small size version is made of soft Nappa calfskin *Small Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet 👛 all sizes of phones 📱 and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 💙💚

Color: Space Grey
Style No.: 9096
Dimensions: 24CM~16CM~10CM

items.name_en: 🔥 New Woven Handle 🔥 The mini soft calfskin Puzzle bag is the first handbag created by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson 👜 The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines 🎀 This small size version is made of soft calfskin 🧸 paired with a unique woven handle. * This small Puzzle bag can hold, for example, a large wallet 👛 all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 It can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, carried by hand, or held as a clutch 😻 Removable adjustable shoulder strap * Zipper closure 🖤 Calfskin zipper head 🔗 An external zippered back pocket and an internal slip pocket * Can be customized with the shoulder strap and personalized charms * Suede lining * Anagram embossing 🛍️

Color: Olive Green Mosaic

items.name_en: 🔥 Raffia Weave Brown/Gold
items.name_cn:
🔥 Raffia Weave Brown/Gold
The newly released Oxalis woven shoulder bag is the perfect choice for vacation and play. Made with raffia woven into a mesh texture, the cutout style creates a lightweight, see-through visual effect while adding a touch of sophistication! Paired with a double-layer leather shoulder strap, the iconic gold metal hardware in the center becomes the highlight 👍
Model: 781289 [Original Leather]
Size: 37x40x3cm

items.name_en: 🔥 Small Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Bag 💥Puzzle outlines a rectangular shape with distinctive geometric lines 🎁 This small version is made of glossy calfskin, featuring denim pants style details 💋 Geometric bag 24CM Puzzle bag, original imported calfskin plain weave 🐮🐮 A best-selling geometric bag 👜 The Puzzle bag is the first handbag created by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson for L0⚡️EWE 😻 The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛 This small size version is made of soft grain calfskin * The small Puzzle can hold, for example, a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried on the shoulder, crossbody, held as a clutch, or with the top handle * Removable 🎁

items.name_en: 🔥🔝New Arrival👏👉Black Oil Wax Leather/Gold🌈YSL New Bag King Bomb! Niki tripouch is truly amazing! Who gets it! This vintage oil wax leather is just on point! The distressed cracks act like a filter. The V-stitching is sharper than a regular quilted pattern. Thick gold chain + metal logo, full of vintage vibes but not too flashy. Medium size is just right for daily outings; fits compact powder, sunglasses, etc. Crossbody is a lazy sister, slung is a cool girl, with a suit is a career woman, with streetwear is a fashionista. Practicality and aesthetics both present.
